title: memo-business.md output schema (legal-contract-review)
description: Business-stakeholder version of the memo — 3-sentence Why/What/What-if translation. Designed for the BD/sales/CEO reader who has 30 seconds. Always in zh-TW.

why.description: 1 sentence — why this contract matters to the business right now

what.description: 1 sentence — what we're agreeing to (the substance)

what_if.description: 1 sentence — what could go wrong and how badly

top_3_business_impacts.description: v0.3.1+: per L7 Step 9.4 headline rule — entries MUST be severity ∈ {yellow, red} with concrete quantifiable downside AND actionable in 30/60/90 days. NEVER ordered by playbook structure.

severity.description: v0.3.1+: green findings go to favorable_position_notes, not Top-3

quantifiable_downside_evidence.description: v0.3.1+: dollar / month / customer / regulatory figure justifying Top-3 inclusion

favorable_position_notes.description: v0.3.1+: per L7 Step 1.5 stance-asymmetry pass — findings whose underlying logic is 'missing best-practice default' but which PROTECT our stance (stance=ours). Surfaces as '✓ 對我方有利' box in memo-business.md.
